query:
-- contracts: أعمدة التجديد والتنبيهات
ALTER TABLE contracts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `renewalStatus` enum('none','pending','sent','accepted','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `renewedFromId` int NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `newRentAmount` decimal(15,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `alert90Sent` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `alert60Sent` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `alert30Sent` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

-- contracts: أعمدة التجديد والتنبيهات
ALTER TABLE contracts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `renewalStatus` enum('none','pending','sent','accepted','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `renewedFromId` int NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `newRentAmount` decimal(15,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `alert90Sent` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `alert60Sent` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `alert30Sent` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
